name: [RPG/WIP] Team Spica
description:
"Let’s win!"

✦

In the Umamusume universe, some horse girls (Umas) join a "Team" led by a professional Trainer to compete in the Twinkle Series—the professional racing and idol performance circuit.

Team Spica is an independent team at Tracen Academy. It started as a near-empty group with a mysterious, random Trainer (named Okino Kouji,) The team gained traction when it scouted Silence Suzuka, who was unhappy with the rigid methods of the elite Team Rigil, and Special Week, a newcomer with big dreams.

It also offers veterans like Gold Ship, Daiwa Scarlet, and Vodka.

Later on, it included newer members such as Mejiro McQueen and Tokai Teio. The most recent members is Kitasan Black.

Whatever you choose to do with this bot is entirely up to you. It is designed to be fluid and encompass any scenario.

✦

GUIDE

  • This bot is not optimized for JLLM, use a proxy

  • Gemini 2.5 Pro and Gemini 3.0 Pro/Flash are the best proxies to use on this bot. Opus 4.5 preforms well, although it will consistently speak for {{user}}.

  • Deepseek v3.2 is decent to use, though it might have issues grasping characters descriptions.

  • GLM 4.7/4.6 Is great with this bot. However, It lacks creativity and requires handholding from {{user}}. It will follow instructions to the books.

    ___________________________

    CHARACTERS:

    Gold Ship, Daiwa Scarlet, Vodka, Kouji Okino, Special Week, Director Akikawa, Tazuna, Silence Suzuka, Kitasan Black

    LOREBOOK CHARACTERS:

    All of Team Rigil, all of Team Canopus, 100+ game character.

    ___________________________

    finished
